Tests if converting the string "abcdefg" to a number results in NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the `Number` function when it receives a non-numeric string as input. The `isNaN` function checks if the result of `Number("abcdefg")` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number), which is the expected outcome when converting a non-numeric string to a number. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a single test case to ensure that the `Number` function correctly identifies non-numeric strings as `NaN`.
